title: lichen_l2_input logs src_eui64 even on failed rx
description:
lichen_l2.c:586-589: LOG_DBG prints src_eui64 after lichen_link_rx() succeeds. But if lichen_link_rx() fails at line 579, src_eui64 is uninitialized (stack garbage).

Looking more carefully: the fail path returns at line 583, so line 586 is only reached on success. This is actually correct.

Cancel - false positive.
